visual_description: A close-up, slightly shaky shot focuses on a silver flip phone resting inside a clear plastic bag. The phone appears old and slightly dirty. To the left, another plastic bag and a small black object with a picture on it are partially visible. The background is a blurry, out-of-focus surface. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The audio consists of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece with a somber and reflective mood. The music is carried by a gentle, mournful melody, creating a feeling of sadness and contemplation. A hand enters the frame from the left and picks up the plastic bag containing the phone. The hand lifts the bag, bringing the phone into clearer view before the shot becomes blurry again. The camera cuts to a medium close-up of a man sitting in what appears to be an office. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a light blue collared shirt and a dark tie. He looks down and to his left with a serious, contemplative expression, holding the plastic bag with the phone in his hand. The background consists of horizontal blinds. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain in the top left corner. The camera remains steady on the man's face. There
